title: Wolfshead: The Legend of Robin Hood
original_title: Wolfshead: The Legend of Robin Hood
overview: Robert of Locksley is harbouring a runaway serf. A warrant is then issued for Robert's arrest: he is now an outlaw. Stars David Warbeck, Kathleen Byron and Ciaran Madden
